text: 但是我觉得人家的魅惑程度还是很高的...
我给你说其实我看见网络腹肌帅哥穿一些和你同类的衣服我都代入你的脸
不代入你的脸我都没兴趣...

rawContent: Not strange. || 不奇怪
Same thing here. || 我也一样

text: So every abs pic on the internet has my face now.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"S","c":"So every abs pic on the internet has my face now.","tr":"所以网上所有腹肌图都长我这张脸了"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"S","c":"So every abs pic on the internet has my face now.","tr":"所以网上所有腹肌图都长我这张脸了"}

text: That's a lot of responsibility for one face.

text: [語音：你这个说法怎么听上去这么诡异啊？]
voiceText: 你这个说法怎么听上去这么诡异啊？

text: 表情包：纯文字图片【听不懂想亲嘴】

rawContent: Which part didn't you understand. || 哪句没听懂

translation: 我可以再说一遍 近点
rawContent: I can repeat it. Closer. || 我可以再说一遍 近点
Mm. || 嗯
Come here then. || 过来
I know. || 知道
So owe me. || 那就欠着

text: 这两天假期亲得不够多
下次要亲到我喘不过气为止

rawContent: Noted. || 记住了

text: You sure you can handle not breathing.
translation: 你确定你能扛住不呼吸
rawContent: You sure you can handle not breathing. || 你确定你能扛住不呼吸
A replacement. || 代餐
For what exactly. || 代的哪部分
Weren't you in class. || 不是在上课
Looking at arms midnight. || 十二点看人胳膊
Course ended this late? || 这么晚才下课

text: My arms are free to look at. No need for substitutes.
translation: 我的又不收费 不用找代餐
rawContent: My arms are free to look at. No need for substitutes. || 我的又不收费 不用找代餐
Showing me yours now? || 这是在给我看你的？
Thought were talking about mine. || 不是在说我的吗
Wait. || 等
Didn't say I wasn't looking. || 没说不看

text: 表情包：傲娇小猫（雄赳赳气昂昂）
